channel.title: Supreme Court Judgments
channel.description: Recently published and updated (translated, amended or corrected) documents

item.title: Quebec (Attorney General) v. Lalande - 2026 SCC 13 - 2026-05-01
item.description: Constitutional reference regarding federal carbon pricing legislation.

item.title: R. v. Sharma - 2022 SCC 39 - 2022-11-04
item.description: Criminal law decision regarding conditional sentence orders.

item.title: R. v. Beaver - 2022 SCC 54 - 2022-12-09
item.description: Criminal law decision regarding search and seizure.
